message:
feat(jira): add Beads sync operations (pull_issue, push_bead, reconcile)

Implement bidirectional Jira <-> Beads synchronization with:
- JiraSyncStore for persistent JSON state under zone_dir
- JiraSyncLease for file-based advisory locking with TTL
- Deterministic fingerprint-based reconciliation with fail-closed
  conflict detection
- ADF-to-plaintext conversion for Jira description fields
- Bead-label extraction and zone_dir negotiation during handshake
- 3 new FCP operations with full manifest schemas, rate limits,
  network constraints, and AI hints
- 5 new sync types (JiraSyncOrigin, JiraSyncAction,
  JiraSyncConflictPolicy, JiraBeadRecord, JiraSyncState)
- 4 integration tests with wiremock: zone_dir enforcement,
  push-bead idempotency, pull-after-push loop prevention,
  and explicit conflict surfacing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:e0e333821303fb122f4d22c50a6ab8db87d13e81bf73f6e0bc58a78d3c56669e"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:74df7253255390d3053affde3ff400cbde3629c53025afa7953aa8bbab81c5a8"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.jira"
@@ -1735,6 +1735,311 @@ common_mistakes = ["Deleting rules without disabling them first."]
 examples = ['{"rule_id": "42"}']
 related = ["jira.automation.rule.list", "jira.automation.rule.disable"]
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Operations: Beads Sync
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue"]
+description = "Project a Jira issue into the canonical Beads sync record"
+capability = "jira.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".input_schema]
+required = ["issue_key"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".input_schema.properties.issue_key]
+description = "Issue key (e.g., 'PROJ-123')"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".input_schema.properties.bead_id]
+description = "Optional bead ID override when the Jira issue is not yet linked"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".input_schema.properties.custom_field_id]
+description = "Optional Jira custom field that stores the bead ID"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".input_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Optional caller-supplied correlation ID echoed in the response and logs"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema]
+required = ["action", "bead", "state"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema.properties.action]
+description = "Chosen sync action: pull_issue when Jira changed, noop when the persisted fingerprint already matches"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema.properties.bead]
+description = "Canonical Beads-facing issue projection"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema.properties.state]
+description = "Deterministic sync state snapshot persisted under the negotiated zone_dir"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Correlation ID echoed from the request or generated by the connector"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".output_schema.properties.reason_codes]
+description = "Stable machine-readable reasons that explain the chosen action"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.atlassian.net"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.pull_issue".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Read a Jira issue, persist its sync snapshot under zone_dir, and convert it into the canonical Beads sync projection."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Forgetting custom_field_id when the bead linkage is stored in a Jira custom field.",
+    "Treating the reserved bead:<id> label as part of the public label set.",
+    "Calling the sync operation before completing handshake with a writable zone_dir.",
+]
+examples = ['{"issue_key": "PROJ-123", "custom_field_id": "customfield_10123"}']
+related = ["jira.sync.reconcile", "jira.sync.push_bead", "jira.get_issue"]
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead"]
+description = "Create or safely update a Jira issue from a canonical Beads record"
+capability = "jira.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".rate_limit]
+max = 60
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema]
+required = ["bead"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.bead]
+description = "Canonical Beads record to create or push into Jira"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.issue_key]
+description = "Existing Jira issue key if the mapping already exists"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.project_key]
+description = "Jira project key required when creating a new issue"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.issue_type]
+description = "Jira issue type required when creating a new issue"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.custom_field_id]
+description = "Optional Jira custom field used to store bead ID linkage"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Optional caller-supplied correlation ID echoed in the response and logs"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.notify_users]
+description = "Whether Jira should notify watchers on update"
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.conflict_policy]
+description = "Conflict policy: fail_closed or last_write_wins"
+enum = ["fail_closed", "last_write_wins"]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".input_schema.properties.transition_comment]
+description = "Optional comment added when the sync performs a Jira workflow transition"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema]
+required = ["action", "state"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.action]
+description = "Chosen sync action"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.created]
+description = "Whether a new Jira issue was created"
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.updated]
+description = "Whether an existing Jira issue was updated"
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.bead]
+description = "Normalized Beads record that drove the sync"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.jira]
+description = "Canonical projection of the Jira issue after the attempted sync"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.state]
+description = "Latest sync state snapshot persisted under the negotiated zone_dir"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.conflict]
+description = "Conflict evidence when the sync aborts fail-closed"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Correlation ID echoed from the request or generated by the connector"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".output_schema.properties.reason_codes]
+description = "Stable machine-readable reasons that explain the chosen action"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.atlassian.net"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.push_bead".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new Jira issue from a Beads record or update an existing mapped issue using the connector's persisted sync state."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Omitting project_key and issue_type when there is no existing issue mapping.",
+    "Treating last_write_wins like a blind force flag; if Jira is newer the connector will recommend pulling instead of overwriting silently.",
+    "Calling the sync operation before completing handshake with a writable zone_dir.",
+]
+examples = ['{"project_key": "PROJ", "issue_type": "Task", "bead": {"beadId": "br-123", "title": "Sync Jira work"}, "conflict_policy": "fail_closed"}']
+related = ["jira.sync.reconcile", "jira.sync.pull_issue", "jira.create_issue", "jira.update_issue"]
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile"]
+description = "Compare a canonical Beads record with the current Jira issue and choose a deterministic next action"
+capability = "jira.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema]
+required = ["bead"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema.properties.bead]
+description = "Canonical Beads record to compare against Jira"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema.properties.issue_key]
+description = "Jira issue key; may also be resolved from bead.issueKey or the connector's persisted sync state"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema.properties.custom_field_id]
+description = "Optional Jira custom field used to store bead ID linkage"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema.properties.conflict_policy]
+description = "Conflict policy: fail_closed or last_write_wins"
+enum = ["fail_closed", "last_write_wins"]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".input_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Optional caller-supplied correlation ID echoed in the response and logs"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema]
+required = ["action", "bead", "jira", "state"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.action]
+description = "Recommended next sync action"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.bead]
+description = "Normalized Beads record provided by the caller"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.jira]
+description = "Canonical projection of the live Jira issue"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.state]
+description = "Latest sync state snapshot persisted under the negotiated zone_dir"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.conflict]
+description = "Conflict evidence when fail-closed reconciliation aborts"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.correlation_id]
+description = "Correlation ID echoed from the request or generated by the connector"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".output_schema.properties.reason_codes]
+description = "Stable machine-readable reasons that explain the chosen action"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.atlassian.net"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations."jira.sync.reconcile".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Preview sync behavior without mutating Jira while updating the connector's persisted sync snapshot."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Calling reconcile without issue_key, bead.issueKey, or an existing persisted mapping, which leaves the connector unable to fetch Jira.",
+    "Calling the sync operation before completing handshake with a writable zone_dir.",
+]
+examples = ['{"issue_key": "PROJ-123", "bead": {"beadId": "br-123", "title": "Sync Jira work"}, "conflict_policy": "last_write_wins"}']
+related = ["jira.sync.pull_issue", "jira.sync.push_bead", "jira.get_issue"]
+
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Operations: Server Info / Deployment Detection
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -1889,4 +2194,7 @@ scope = "instance"
 "jira.automation.rule.enable" = ["jira.write"]
 "jira.automation.rule.disable" = ["jira.write"]
 "jira.automation.rule.delete" = ["jira.delete"]
+"jira.sync.pull_issue" = ["jira.read"]
+"jira.sync.push_bead" = ["jira.write"]
+"jira.sync.reconcile" = ["jira.read"]
 "jira.server.info" = ["jira.read"]

@@ -190,6 +190,133 @@ pub struct SearchResult {
     pub start_at: u64,
 }
 
+// ── Beads Sync ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+/// Direction/origin marker for Jira ↔ Beads synchronization.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
+pub enum JiraSyncOrigin {
+    /// The Jira copy is authoritative for this sync step.
+    Jira,
+    /// The Beads copy is authoritative for this sync step.
+    Beads,
+}
+
+/// Reconciliation action chosen by the sync engine.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
+pub enum JiraSyncAction {
+    /// No mutation required; both sides already converge.
+    Noop,
+    /// Push the Beads projection into Jira.
+    PushBead,
+    /// Pull the Jira issue into a Beads projection.
+    PullIssue,
+    /// Abort because both sides changed concurrently.
+    Conflict,
+}
+
+/// Conflict resolution policy for a sync run.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
+pub enum JiraSyncConflictPolicy {
+    /// Default: fail closed and surface an explicit conflict object.
+    #[default]
+    FailClosed,
+    /// Deterministically prefer one side when both changed.
+    LastWriteWins,
+}
+
+/// Canonical Beads-facing issue projection used by Jira sync operations.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct JiraBeadRecord {
+    /// Stable bead identifier.
+    pub bead_id: String,
+    /// Title / summary.
+    pub title: String,
+    /// Optional Markdown description.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub description: Option<String>,
+    /// Optional workflow status.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub status: Option<String>,
+    /// Optional priority label.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub priority: Option<String>,
+    /// Optional labels.
+    #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Vec::is_empty")]
+    pub labels: Vec<String>,
+    /// Optional assignee identifier.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub assignee: Option<String>,
+    /// Optional due date in `YYYY-MM-DD`.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub due_date: Option<String>,
+    /// Optional estimate in seconds.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub estimate_seconds: Option<u64>,
+    /// Linked Jira issue key when known.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub issue_key: Option<String>,
+    /// Linked Jira issue ID when known.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub issue_id: Option<String>,
+    /// Revision fingerprint/timestamp for the Beads-side copy.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub revision: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Persistable synchronization state that callers can store via connector state plumbing.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct JiraSyncState {
+    /// Stable bead identifier if the mapping is established.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub bead_id: Option<String>,
+    /// Jira issue key if the mapping is established.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub issue_key: Option<String>,
+    /// Jira issue ID if known.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub issue_id: Option<String>,
+    /// Deterministic projection fingerprint for the last synced Beads payload.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub bead_fingerprint: Option<String>,
+    /// Deterministic projection fingerprint for the last synced Jira payload.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub jira_fingerprint: Option<String>,
+    /// Last synced Beads revision marker.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub bead_revision: Option<String>,
+    /// Last synced Jira revision marker.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub jira_revision: Option<String>,
+    /// Which side authored the last successful sync.
+    pub last_sync_origin: JiraSyncOrigin,
+    /// Tombstone for archived/deleted mappings.
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub tombstoned: bool,
+}
+
+/// Explicit conflict evidence returned by `jira.sync.reconcile`.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
+pub struct JiraSyncConflict {
+    /// Stable reason code suitable for automation.
+    pub reason_code: String,
+    /// Current Beads-side fingerprint.
+    pub bead_fingerprint: String,
+    /// Current Jira-side fingerprint.
+    pub jira_fingerprint: String,
+    /// Beads revision marker, if present.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub bead_revision: Option<String>,
+    /// Jira revision marker, if present.
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub jira_revision: Option<String>,
+}
+
 // ── Attachment ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 /// Jira attachment metadata.
@@ -432,6 +559,82 @@ mod tests {
         assert!(val["changelog"].is_null());
     }
 
+    // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+    // Jira Sync Types
+    // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+    #[test]
+    fn jira_sync_origin_roundtrip() {
+        let value = serde_json::to_value(JiraSyncOrigin::Beads).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(value, json!("beads"));
+        let roundtrip: JiraSyncOrigin = serde_json::from_value(value).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(roundtrip, JiraSyncOrigin::Beads);
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn jira_sync_conflict_policy_default() {
+        assert_eq!(
+            JiraSyncConflictPolicy::default(),
+            JiraSyncConflictPolicy::FailClosed
+        );
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn jira_bead_record_roundtrip() {
+        let bead = JiraBeadRecord {
+            bead_id: "br-123".into(),
+            title: "Fix Jira sync".into(),
+            description: Some("Ship deterministic mapping.".into()),
+            status: Some("in_progress".into()),
+            priority: Some("1".into()),
+            labels: vec!["backend".into(), "jira".into()],
+            assignee: Some("acct-1".into()),
+            due_date: Some("2026-03-31".into()),
+            estimate_seconds: Some(3600),
+            issue_key: Some("PROJ-12".into()),
+            issue_id: Some("10012".into()),
+            revision: Some("bead-rev-7".into()),
+        };
+
+        let value = serde_json::to_value(&bead).unwrap();
+        let roundtrip: JiraBeadRecord = serde_json::from_value(value).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(roundtrip, bead);
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn jira_sync_state_roundtrip() {
+        let state = JiraSyncState {
+            bead_id: Some("br-123".into()),
+            issue_key: Some("PROJ-12".into()),
+            issue_id: Some("10012".into()),
+            bead_fingerprint: Some("{\"title\":\"x\"}".into()),
+            jira_fingerprint: Some("{\"title\":\"y\"}".into()),
+            bead_revision: Some("bead-rev-7".into()),
+            jira_revision: Some("2026-03-09T00:00:00Z".into()),
+            last_sync_origin: JiraSyncOrigin::Jira,
+            tombstoned: false,
+        };
+
+        let value = serde_json::to_value(&state).unwrap();
+        let roundtrip: JiraSyncState = serde_json::from_value(value).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(roundtrip, state);
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn jira_sync_conflict_roundtrip() {
+        let conflict = JiraSyncConflict {
+            reason_code: "concurrent_changes_detected".into(),
+            bead_fingerprint: "{\"title\":\"local\"}".into(),
+            jira_fingerprint: "{\"title\":\"remote\"}".into(),
+            bead_revision: Some("b-1".into()),
+            jira_revision: Some("j-1".into()),
+        };
+
+        let value = serde_json::to_value(&conflict).unwrap();
+        let roundtrip: JiraSyncConflict = serde_json::from_value(value).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(roundtrip, conflict);
+    }
+
     // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     // CreateIssueResponse
     // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
@@ -1854,7 +2057,10 @@ mod tests {
             "serverTitle": "My Jira"
         });
         let info: JiraServerInfo = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap();
-        assert_eq!(info.base_url.as_deref(), Some("https://mysite.atlassian.net"));
+        assert_eq!(
+            info.base_url.as_deref(),
+            Some("https://mysite.atlassian.net")
+        );
         assert_eq!(info.version.as_deref(), Some("1001.0.0-SNAPSHOT"));
         assert_eq!(info.deployment_type.as_deref(), Some("Cloud"));
         assert_eq!(info.build_number, Some(100227));
